title: Bedwars73
description: The best resource pack for Bedwars!
body:
## 🚀 General

**Bedwars73** is a simple resource pack designed to give Bedwars a cleaner, more pleasing look.

> It doesn’t change the gameplay; it simply improves textures and models for a clearer and more readable style, making blocks and items easier to recognize.

## ✨ Changes

* 🧱 Simplified block textures for a cleaner look
* 🗡️ Smaller, more discrete item and tool models
* 🎯 Reduced visual clutter in common Bedwars elements 
* ⚡ A more refined and pleasant overall style

## 📦 Preview

***Shop Items:***

![Shop Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41536f439e3211e6afd687ab92ff7cfc0a216f84.png)

***Blocks on the map:***

![Blocks on the map](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14467c475c0548ef2b4504beff8b8460489897fb.png)

## 💬 More

If you have ideas, found a bug, or just want to share your opinion, feel free to join the Discord 🙂  
https://discord.gg/xgpsxDyxUW

## 🔮 What's planned

If the pack does well, I may add:

* Custom armor
* More visual improvements
* Custom GUI
